package rulecoverage

func PositiveErrorStringComparison() string {
    ruleID := "error_string_comparison"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`if err.Error() == \"some error\"` string comparison for error checking"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
